description: Coverage map for ALL_CAPS tokens found in docs/architecture/wiki/screens/*/interactions.md. Gameplay mutations must either be declared in command.schema.json, mapped here to a canonical command kind, or marked out of scope with an owning backlog task. Prefix-listed tokens are UI-local routing, selection, preview, draft, or presentation events that do not enter the deterministic command log.

outOfScope.AI_PROVIDER_TIMEOUT: Error code from docs/architecture/error-taxonomy.md (AI_* prefix); not a command. Surfaced by docs/architecture/error-ux.md.
outOfScope.AI_WORKER_BUSY: Error code from docs/architecture/error-taxonomy.md (AI_* prefix); not a command. Surfaced by docs/architecture/error-ux.md.
outOfScope.UI_TRACE_DIVERGENCE: Error code from docs/architecture/error-taxonomy.md (UI_* prefix); not a command. Surfaced by docs/architecture/error-ux.md.
outOfScope.DISPATCHER_REJECTED: Default dispatcher rejection code from docs/architecture/error-taxonomy.md (DISPATCHER_* prefix); not a command. Surfaced by the per-screen Error surfaces tables generated from docs/architecture/error-ux.md § 2.
outOfScope.STORAGE_REJECTED: Default save/persistence rejection code from docs/architecture/error-taxonomy.md (STORAGE_* prefix); not a command. Surfaced by the per-screen Error surfaces tables generated from docs/architecture/error-ux.md § 2.
outOfScope.NET_REJECTED: Default network/multiplayer rejection code from docs/architecture/error-taxonomy.md (NET_* prefix); not a command. Surfaced by the per-screen Error surfaces tables generated from docs/architecture/error-ux.md § 2.
outOfScope.VALIDATION_REJECTED: Default validation rejection code from docs/architecture/error-taxonomy.md (VALIDATION_* prefix); not a command. Surfaced by the per-screen Error surfaces tables generated from docs/architecture/error-ux.md § 2.
outOfScope.END_BATTLE_TURN: mvp.09-tactical-combat owns the per-stack turn-end command; reserved single-flight kind referenced from the dispatcher policy in docs/architecture/command-schema.md § Single-flight commands.
outOfScope.LAUNCH_NETWORK_GAME: phase-3.01-multiplayer owns network lobby launch commands.
outOfScope.REQUEST_LOBBY_SLOT_CHANGE: phase-3.01-multiplayer owns network lobby slot mutation.
outOfScope.APPROVE_PEER: phase-3.01-multiplayer.14-host-approval-and-moderation owns the host approval gate per docs/architecture/peer-identity.md.
outOfScope.REJECT_PEER: phase-3.01-multiplayer.14-host-approval-and-moderation owns the host rejection gate per docs/architecture/peer-identity.md.
outOfScope.KICK_PEER: phase-3.01-multiplayer.14-host-approval-and-moderation owns the host-side kick + denylist append per docs/architecture/peer-identity.md.
outOfScope.MUTE_PEER: phase-3.01-multiplayer.18-mute-block-and-trust-banner owns the local-only chat suppression command per docs/architecture/chat-safety.md § 7 and the docs/architecture/wiki/screens/64-network-lobby/ interactions table.
outOfScope.BLOCK_PEER: phase-3.01-multiplayer.18-mute-block-and-trust-banner owns the local-only block command (superset of mute) per docs/architecture/chat-safety.md § 7.
outOfScope.REPORT_PEER: phase-3.01-multiplayer.19-report-bundle-and-export owns the report flow that builds a report-bundle.schema.json blob and triggers a local download per docs/architecture/chat-safety.md § 8; the local audit-log write side stays per docs/architecture/signaling-audit-log.md § 7.
outOfScope.EXPORT_CHAT_LOG: phase-3.01-multiplayer.19-report-bundle-and-export owns the local chat-log export per docs/architecture/chat-safety.md § 8.
outOfScope.ACKNOWLEDGE_CHAT_TRUST_BANNER: phase-3.01-multiplayer.18-mute-block-and-trust-banner owns the localStorage-backed banner-dismiss flag per docs/architecture/chat-safety.md § 10.
outOfScope.CLOSE_ROOM: phase-3.01-multiplayer.01-signaling-server-node-js-websocket-lobby owns the host-initiated room close command per docs/architecture/lobby-identifiers.md § 7.
outOfScope.PEER_PENDING: Signaling server-to-host event surfaced in screens/64-network-lobby; not a UI command. Owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.14-host-approval-and-moderation.
outOfScope.PEER_REJECTED: Signaling server-to-joiner event surfaced in screens/64-network-lobby; not a UI command. Owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.14-host-approval-and-moderation.
outOfScope.PEER_KICKED: Signaling server-to-joiner event surfaced in screens/64-network-lobby; not a UI command. Owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.14-host-approval-and-moderation.
outOfScope.JOIN_ATTEMPT_REJECTED: Signaling server-to-host aggregated rejection event surfaced in screens/64-network-lobby; not a UI command. Owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.13-signaling-rate-limiting.
outOfScope.ROOM_CLOSED: Signaling server-to-all event on host CLOSE_ROOM surfaced in screens/64-network-lobby; not a UI command. Owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.01-signaling-server-node-js-websocket-lobby.
outOfScope.RESTORE_OVERWRITTEN_SAVE: mvp.08-persistence.11-save-import-screen-and-quarantine owns the rolling overwrite-ring restore command per docs/architecture/pack-trust.md § Save Quarantine.
outOfScope.GRANT_PACK_TRUST: mvp.08-persistence.12-pack-trust-prompt-and-manager owns the trust-store write per docs/architecture/pack-trust.md § Trust Anchors.
outOfScope.DENY_PACK_TRUST: mvp.08-persistence.12-pack-trust-prompt-and-manager owns the trust-store deny write per docs/architecture/pack-trust.md § Trust Anchors.
outOfScope.RUN_PACK_SANDBOXED: mvp.08-persistence.12-pack-trust-prompt-and-manager owns the sandboxed-decision write per docs/architecture/pack-trust.md § Trust Anchors.
outOfScope.REVOKE_PACK_TRUST: mvp.08-persistence.12-pack-trust-prompt-and-manager owns trust-store revocation per docs/architecture/pack-trust.md § Trust Anchors.
outOfScope.INSTALL_PACK_FROM_FILE: mvp.08-persistence.12-pack-trust-prompt-and-manager owns the pack-install entry point per docs/architecture/pack-trust.md § Resource Limits.
outOfScope.REMOVE_PACK: mvp.08-persistence.12-pack-trust-prompt-and-manager owns pack uninstall and trust-store cleanup per docs/architecture/pack-trust.md.
outOfScope.ENTER_SAFE_MODE: mvp.08-persistence.12-pack-trust-prompt-and-manager owns the safe-mode toggle per docs/architecture/pack-trust.md § Safe Mode.
outOfScope.WIPE_LOCAL_DATA: mvp.08-persistence.14-wipe-local-data-handler owns the wipe-local-data handler per docs/architecture/data-inventory.md § Wipe-Scope Policy.
outOfScope.ACCEPT_PUBLISH_DISCLAIMER: phase-2.04-content-editor.10-publish-disclaimer-flow owns the per-pack content-policy ack write per docs/architecture/ugc-safety.md.
outOfScope.SUBMIT_CONTENT_REPORT: phase-2.05-mod-system.12-content-report-intake-and-local-queue owns the content-report queue write per docs/architecture/wiki/screens/75-content-report/.
outOfScope.ATTACH_CONTENT_REPORT_SCREENSHOT: phase-2.05-mod-system.12-content-report-intake-and-local-queue owns the optional screenshot attach affordance per docs/architecture/wiki/screens/75-content-report/.
outOfScope.OWNER_NOTICE: Signaling server-to-host authenticated channel event carrying the richer ownerReason enum from content-schema/schemas/signaling-error.schema.json; not a UI command. Owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.01-signaling-server-node-js-websocket-lobby per services/signaling/error-codes.md.
outOfScope.NETWORK_ERROR: Closed peerFailureReason enum value rendered to UI on a peer-connection failure per docs/architecture/wiki/screens/64-network-lobby/spec.md § Peer-Failure Error Contract; not a command. Surfaced by formatUserError -> errors.peer.failed.
outOfScope.PROTOCOL_MISMATCH: Closed peerFailureReason enum value rendered to UI on a peer-connection failure per docs/architecture/wiki/screens/64-network-lobby/spec.md § Peer-Failure Error Contract; not a command. Surfaced by formatUserError -> errors.peer.failed.
outOfScope.POLICY_ACCEPTED: Closed audit-log-entry.schema.json type emitted on privacy-policy acceptance per docs/architecture/wiki/screens/56-options/interactions.md § Privacy disclosure modal; not a command. Owned by mvp.07-ui-shell.26-privacy-disclosure-modal.
